description: Style note A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this belt from baggit is specially crafted to ensure optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies! Product Details Black belt Tang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in place Thick belt with contrast stitch detail for style and holes to customise fit Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
